value.found_quote: While each text generation request is independent and stateless, you can still implement multi-turn conversations by providing additional messages as parameters to your text generation request.
value.rationale: The page has an explicit section titled "Manually manage conversation state" that describes exactly what the claim states: multi-turn conversation context can be preserved by manually passing prior message history as input on each request. The page provides code examples showing how to build a history array of prior messages and pass it as the `input` parameter on each subsequent request, directly substantiating the claim.
